utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 items appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) destination: specified (Prague, Czech Republic) — OK. (2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (September 25-29, 2024) — OK. (3) transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided: 'Budget Airlines - Economy Class, €100' — lacks specific flight details (airline name may be generic, but no flight numbers, departure/arrival cities/times). However the format only asks for 'flight details with costs' and cost is given; minimal detail ambiguous. Still, 'Budget Airlines' is not a real airline and no route info; treat as insufficient details. (4) accommodation: 'Eco Lodge (4 nights), €360' — missing hotel name/address; but format asks 'hotel selection with costs' — 'Eco Lodge' could be a selection and cost is given; arguably sufficient, but 'Eco Lodge' is generic; still counts as selected hotel with cost. (5) activities: 'selected activities with costs' — listed with individual costs — OK. (6) additional_services: 'Estimated Meals: €35 per day for 5 days' — includes cost estimate — OK. (7) total_budget: '€710' — provided. Thus, items clearly complete: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 6. Transportation lacks adequate flight details beyond a generic label, so not fully specified. Therefore 6/7.
